name: First Piedmont Federal Savings And Loan Association Of Gaffney
description_short: Federal savings and loan association operating since 1933 with $300M+ in assets, offering personal and business banking across seven offices in South Carolina.
description_long:
First Piedmont Federal Savings and Loan Association of Gaffney was chartered in 1933 as one of the first U.S. savings and loan associations to receive a federal charter. The institution has grown into a regional financial services provider with over $300 million in assets and maintains a presence across the Gaffney and Spartanburg communities in South Carolina with seven office locations.

First Piedmont offers a comprehensive suite of banking services for both personal and business customers. On the personal side, they provide checking accounts, savings accounts, CDs, IRAs, mortgage loans, home equity loans, vehicle loans, personal loans, and investment services. Business customers have access to dedicated checking and savings accounts, CDs, investments, and loan products. The institution also offers 24/7 account access through multiple channels including phone banking (BankLine24), ATM networks, and online banking platforms with the ability to enroll for digital access directly through their website.

The company distinguishes itself through its community-focused positioning and emphasis on customer protection. First Piedmont prominently features multiple fraud and identity theft safeguards, including an online services guarantee and dedicated resources for reporting fraud, stolen cards, and email scams. Their website includes explicit anti-phishing warnings and encourages customers to call verified numbers to report suspicious communications. The institution has maintained continuity since 1933 and emphasizes that customer satisfaction has been their "top priority" throughout their history.

For most consumers, First Piedmont functions as a straightforward regional community bank with standard banking products. The $300M+ asset base suggests moderate capacity for lending and services. However, the website provides limited detail on specific rates, fees, or competitive advantages beyond their established reputation. Customers should note this is a traditional brick-and-mortar institution with defined office hours (8:30am-5:00pm weekdays) rather than a 24/7 digital-first bank, though online and phone services do provide extended access.
pros: Long-established institution with federal charter since 1933 and $300M+ in assets, indicating stability and longevity
Multiple office locations (7 offices) across Gaffney and Spartanburg communities for in-person service and relationship banking
24/7 account access available through BankLine24 phone banking, ATM networks, and online banking platforms
Comprehensive fraud and identity theft protection resources including online services guarantee and dedicated fraud reporting channels
Full-service offerings including personal banking, business banking, investment services, and multiple loan products
Anti-phishing warnings and customer education about fraudulent communications on homepage
Ability to apply for mortgage loans and credit cards directly through website
cons: Website provides no specific interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules for any products, requiring customers to contact branches for pricing
Limited digital innovation compared to modern neobanks; traditional branch-based model with fixed office hours (8:30am-5:00pm weekdays)
No obvious mobile app information or mobile banking prominence mentioned on website
Investment services disclaimer notes non-deposit products are not FDIC insured and may lose value, with limited details on investment options
Smaller regional footprint limited to South Carolina compared to national banks, restricting branch access for relocated customers

contact.address: 1229 W Floyd Baker Blvd, Gaffney, SC 29341

best_for: Community-focused customers in Gaffney and Spartanburg who value in-person relationships with their financial institution
Customers prioritizing established, stable institutions with nearly 100 years of operational history
Small business owners seeking dedicated business banking services with local relationship management
Customers concerned about fraud protection and seeking an institution with transparent security messaging
diagnosis: First Piedmont is a stable, community-oriented regional bank best suited for customers in the Gaffney/Spartanburg area seeking traditional full-service banking with established security practices. The main caveat is the lack of transparent pricing information online and limited digital-first features compared to modern alternatives; serious customers should contact branches directly for current rates and fee schedules.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 1229 W Floyd Baker Blvd, Gaffney, SC 29341
